text:
real cost of MCP token bloat, at scale:

$15/M input tokens (Claude Opus)
10 conversations/user/day
1,000 active users
50K tokens of MCP overhead per conversation

= $7,500/day just for tool definitions. before a single message is processed.

if you swapped to well-designed MCP servers (PostgreSQL-style, ~50 tokens/tool):

same setup: 1K users, 10 convos/day
50 tokens overhead (vs 50K)

= $7.50/day

1000x difference. same functionality.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

the token cost problem isn't visible in dev. it shows up in your month-end invoice.

most teams discover it when they scale, not before.

agent-friend surfaces it before you ship: pip install agent-friend
